overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character paddling a canoe through a rocky river canyon. The journey progresses from turbulent rapids through a widening valley and into a narrow, shadowed gorge with obstacles.

events.description: character ducks down in the canoe to pass under a low rock overhang

agents.ego_description: paddling the canoe downstream through moderate rapids, navigating the white water

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face with layered sedimentary rock formations
sloped riverbank covered with pine trees and green vegetation
turbulent white water with visible current and small waves
tall evergreen trees lining the top of the canyon ridges
low rock overhang extending from the right canyon wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the canoe navigating a narrow canyon with steep rocky walls and moderate rapids. The character paddles steadily through the churning white water before ducking down at 7.5 seconds to pass safely under a low rock overhang that extends from the right cliff face.

scene_state.functional_zone: wider river valley with forested banks

agents.ego_description: paddling steadily through calmer waters as the canyon opens into a wider valley

entered.detail: sandy and pebble shoreline along the right bank of the river
large boulders protruding from the water surface in the distance

segments.scene_description: The canyon widens significantly into a broad river valley with calmer waters. The steep cliff walls recede into the distance, revealing gravel beaches along the shoreline and scattered boulders in the river ahead. The character maintains a steady paddling rhythm through the more tranquil section.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow shadowed canyon with rocky obstacles

events.description: river current becomes more turbulent with visible rocks and white water rapids
entering a heavily shadowed section as canyon walls close in overhead

agents.ego_description: carefully maneuvering the canoe around rocks in the narrowing, shadowed canyon with faster current

entered.detail: massive boulders creating white water rapids and obstacles in the river channel
dark rocky cliffs casting deep shadows over the water surface

segments.scene_description: The river narrows dramatically into a tight gorge with large rocks creating turbulent white water rapids. The canyon walls close in on both sides, blocking most sunlight and casting the scene in deep shadow. The character paddles with more caution, steering the canoe through the hazardous obstacles as the current quickens.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a river canyon that shifts from turbulent rapids into a wide valley before closing into a shadowed gorge. It begins with the canoe navigating a narrow passage of churning white water, where the character must duck low to pass beneath a rocky overhang extending from the cliff face. As the river opens up, the steep walls recede to reveal a broad valley with calmer waters, gravel beaches, and scattered boulders. The scene then shifts as the river narrows dramatically once more, with the canyon walls closing in to block the sunlight and cast the environment in deep shadow. Finally, the camera follows the canoe as it steers cautiously through hazardous obstacles and quickening currents within the tight, dark gorge.
